sentence_reviews.text: World-model rollout simulates possible futures in learned latent or observation space so a policy or planner can evaluate actions without immediate real-world interaction.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Dreamer learned world-model rollouts, RL model-based planning background, and AIMA simulation/planning material.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited sources directly support model-based simulated futures for action evaluation.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of World-model rollout & imagination is to connect Latent world models & predictive dynamics, Model-based reinforcement learning to downstream capabilities including Robotics & embodied AI.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Dreamer world-model control, RL model-based planning, and agent/control background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The dependencies are strongly supported; the robotics/embodied-AI downstream role is synthesized from control benchmarks and agent settings.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Dreamer embodied-control context and AIMA agents/control background.
sentence_reviews.notes: World models support embodied control, but the packet evidence is not a direct robotics survey.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Latent world models & predictive dynamics
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Dreamer latent world model and RL model-based prediction material.
sentence_reviews.notes: Rollout directly combines with learned predictive/world models.

sentence_reviews.text: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Latent world models & predictive dynamics, Model-based reinforcement learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Model-based rollout/planning cost and model-error background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Planning cost and model-error risk are supported; self-evaluation/confident-error wording is broader than the cited sources.

sentence_reviews.text: World-model rollout & imagination uses Latent world models & predictive dynamics as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Dreamer world-model rollout and model-based RL dynamics material.
sentence_reviews.notes: Predictive/world models are core to the node.

sentence_reviews.text: World-model rollout & imagination uses Model-based reinforcement learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: RL model-based planning and Dreamer model-based control material.
sentence_reviews.notes: Rollouts over a model are directly part of model-based RL planning/control.

sentence_reviews.text: World-model rollout & imagination uses Monte Carlo tree search as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA MCTS and RL planning/rollout background.
sentence_reviews.notes: MCTS can use model rollouts, but world-model rollout does not generally require MCTS.

edge_reviews.notes: A predictive world model is core to simulated rollout/imagination.
Model-based RL directly uses learned/known models for planning and rollout.
MCTS is a possible rollout/search consumer, but not a common dependency of world-model rollout itself.
